narrative:
Montgomery-Combined township has 2,023 registered voters, with 44.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.7 percentage points.
